title: crunchy show-off saudi-arabian buttery tagine
description: A show-off saudi-arabian dish featuring a crunchy topping and a rich, buttery tagine. This pescatarian-friendly recipe is perfect for a dinner party.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the olive oil, onion, and garlic, and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chicken broth, cranberry juice, ginger, cinnamon stick, salt, and cumin. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the pistachios and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix the flour and panko breadcrumbs in a small bowl.
Roll the top of the tagine in the breadcrumb mixture to coat.
Increase the heat to medium-high and cook until the breadcrumbs are golden brown and crunchy, about 5 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional pistachios if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
